title: 16 to 19 funding: allocation calculation toolkit guides
body: "We have published the 16 to 19 allocation calculation toolkit (ACT) guidance on this page and it will help you understand your ACT file and how we have used your data.  You can find your ACT file in Document exchange in the ‘Documents received from DfE’ section. To access Document exchange, log into DfE Sign-In. If you need access, please contact one of the super-users in your organisation. If you experience any issues accessing DfE Sign-In, please contact the help desk.  "

taxons.title: Funding for 16 to 19 year olds in schools
